diagnosis: All attempted backends failed. See /Users/ghost/core/anima/state/r2_lifecycle_apply.log for HTTP response + signer output.
remediation_steps: 1. Verify rclone.conf [r2] has access_key_id / secret_access_key / endpoint.
2. Re-run with --bucket <name> to isolate a single failing bucket.
4. Optional: brew install awscli as final fallback.
